hints: Tiempo: Para el próximo trimestre (marcador temporal futuro)

spanishSentence: Para el próximo trimestre, el equipo habrá monitoreado continuamente las métricas de rendimiento del sistema.
correctSentence: By next quarter, the team will have monitored the system performance metrics continuously.

hints: Tiempo: Para el final del sprint (marcador temporal futuro)

correctSentence: By the end of the sprint, the frontend developer will not have rendered all the components that were requested.

hints: Tiempo: al final de este sprint
